name: Quinoa Breakfast
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup crushed pineapple or pineapple juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the grains.
2. Boil then simmer the quinoa in water and molasses for ten minutes.
3. Add the oats and fruit and simmer for another 15 minutes.
Makes one large serving (or two small ones).
Variations: Try adding some vanilla, cinnamon, nutmeg, yeast, etc.
All measurements are approximate.
